ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', $RecordType.Name = 'Partner Opportunity', Number_of_Off_Payroll_Protect_Products__c > 0, TEXT(OPP_Approval_Status__c) <> 'Approved', CASE(StageName, "Closed Won", 1, "Agreement", 1,0 ) = 1 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: OV3: Please submit the record for Off Payroll Protect Approval before moving ahead.
